texts: Added Team Draft. Try it out if you want a fresh way to play the game.
Swapped out the searchable questions section at the bottom of the Feedback page for a link to the Manager's Guide.
Changed the scoring function for the search bar in the Manager's Guide.
Added the number of votes per response to each question when viewing the popularity poll's results.
Updated Shi Don's square icon. Due to browser caching behaviors, clearing the cache may be required to get the updated one.
Fixed an issue where you could continue to click options after one was already selected.
Disabled the links on identities and E.G.Os on the current/completed team to prevent accidental navigation, and consequently, loss of draft progress.
Added a short line in the page intro mentioning using Company Data to set the Blacklist.
Fixed an issue where swapping to the E.G.O selection menu for the Black/Whitelist could cause the page to crash.
